## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why this change is needed.

## Verification

List the commands and manual checks performed.

## Risk review

- [ ] Financial calculations remain deterministic and tested, or this change does not affect them.
- [ ] Missing or partial data remains explicit.
- [ ] Privacy, security, migration, compatibility, performance, and rollback implications were considered.
- [ ] Tests cover relevant success and failure paths.
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when behavior or compatibility changes.
- [ ] No broker exports, portfolio data, databases, secrets, generated artifacts, or personal information are included.
